description_long: A young adult male stands upright, dressed in a long, modern trench coat with a high collar and wide lapels, layered over a fitted shirt and pants. The coat features quilted sleeves and a split at the back hem, giving it a stylish, urban look. He wears tall, buckled boots and a utility belt with visible pouches, suggesting a practical, streetwise character. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and he sports a full beard and mustache, along with short, tightly curled hair. The figure also wears rectangular eyeglasses, adding a touch of intellectual flair. The overall appearance is sleek, contemporary, and suited for a metropolitan environment.
description: A bearded adult male in a long, high-collared trench coat, utility belt, and tall boots, with short curly hair and glasses, exuding a modern urban style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high-collared trench coat, glasses, beard, utility belt, and boots clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the coat's length, sleeve quilting, and profile of the boots and glasses.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the split back hem of the coat, the full length of the boots, and the back of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the coat's fit, sleeve detail, and relaxed hand posture.
attribute_clothing_type: long modern trench coat with high collar, fitted shirt, utility belt, and quilted sleeves
